memoryArtifacts.headline: Harman Pedigree, Visitation of Kent, [England]
memoryArtifacts.description: Bannerman, Wm Bruce, The visitation of Kent, 1330/1331. 1574 Vol 74: pg. 61: Pedigree showing Elizabeth, daughter of William Harman of Ayrde alias Crayford, md to John Leonard Cusate brenird [sic MS.] [FSC digital version]

zh.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Harman於1486年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Sir Henry Harman of Ellam31歲，母親Mary22歲。他於1503年與Margaret Boteler在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年1月9日在英國倫敦享年61歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Harman于1486年出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Sir Henry Harman of Ellam31岁，母亲Mary22岁。他于1503年与Margaret Boteler在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年1月9日在英国倫敦享年61岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Harman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southeast), Dutch, and Czech: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’ (see Hermann ). In England this name was introduced by the Normans.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): perhaps a nickname for someone with a copious or noticeable head of hair (see   Haar  ).

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Herman
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, Flemish, Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. Compare Harman 5.
Americanized form of German   Hermann  , a cognate of 1 above.
English: perhaps a shortened form of Herniman, a topographic name for a ‘dweller (in a) nook or corner of land’, from Middle English herne, hirne, hurne + man. See also Hearn .

variants.name: Hermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Jurgen, Mathias, Gottlieb, Horst, Juergen, Klaus, Lorenz, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and some other European countries; see also below. Compare Harman 5.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German name (see 1 above). Compare   Herman  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Harman was born in 1486, in London, England, his father, Sir Henry Harman of Ellam, was 31 and his mother, Mary, was 22. He married Margaret Boteler in 1503, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 January 1547, in London, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Harman est né en 1486, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Harman of Ellam, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Boteler en 1503, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1547, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Harman 1486 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Harman of Ellam 31 und seine Mutter Mary 22. Er hat 1503 in London, England Margaret Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1547 im Alter von 61 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Harman è nato il nel 1486 nel London, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Harman of Ellam, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Boteler nel 1503, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1547, nel London, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Harmanが1486年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Harman of Ellamは31歳，母Maryは22歳であった。1503年にイギリスロンドンでMargaret Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年1月9日にイギリスロンドンで61歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Harman(이)가 1486년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Harman of Ellam(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1503년 영국 런던에서 Margaret Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 1월 9일 영국 런던에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Harman nasceu em 1486, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Harman of Ellam, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Boteler em 1503, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1547, em London, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Harman родился в 1486 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Harman of Ellam было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Boteler в 1503 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 января 1547 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Harman nació en 1486, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Harman of Ellam, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Boteler en 1503, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1547, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
